falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score decreases below 25 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant reduction in blowoff pressure would contradict the current HOLD signal, suggesting the market is no longer in a high-volatility phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 2022 May Luna bottom's 30-day high by 10% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this historical threshold would invalidate the pattern's similarity claim, indicating a new bullish trend rather than a continuation of the prior bottom.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 200%+ of the 2022 May Luna bottom's average daily volume for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would indicate strong market participation diverging from the historical pattern, directly refuting the 81% similarity claim.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
